title: Kannaane Kanne Lyrics Naanum Rowdydhaan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song : Kannaane Kanne
Singer : Sean Roldan
Lyrics : Vignesh Shivan
Music : Anirudh Ravichander

Kannaana Kannae
nee kalangaadhadee
Kannaana Kannae
Kannaana Kannae
nee kalangaadhadee
nee kalangaadhadee

Yaar pona
yaar pona enna
yaar pona
yaar pona
yaar pona enna
naan irupenadi
nee kalangaadhadee

Kannaana Kannae
nee kalangaadhadee
yaar pona enna
naan irupenadi

Yen veral idukkula
un viral kedakkanum
nasungura alavukku
irukki naan
pudikkanum.

naan kanna thorakkayil
un mugam theriyanum.
usurulla varaikkumey
unakku enna pudikkanum.

kadal alai polavum
kaal thottu orasi
kadal ulla oravan
naanilladi.

kadal manna pola
un kaaloda otti
kara thaandum varathaan
iruppaendai.

Kannaana Kannae
nee kalangaadhadee
yaar pona enna
naan irupenadi

Nitham nitham
nee odanjaa
otta vekka naan irukken.

peththavanga pona enna
saththamilla un ulagil
nitham
oru muththam vekkathaan
uyir vazhurendi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannaane Kanne?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional depth of the characters in the movie.

Who composed the music for Naanum Rowdydhaan?

Anirudh Ravichander composed the music for the film, bringing his signature style to the soundtrack.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song appears during a poignant moment, highlighting the emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kannaane Kanne?

The lyrics were penned by Vignesh Shivan, known for his poetic and heartfelt writing.

When was Naanum Rowdydhaan released?

The movie was released in 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannaane Kanne from Naanum Rowdydhaan is a beautiful melody that explores themes of love and emotional vulnerability. Sung by Sean Roldan, the song's soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics by Vignesh Shivan create a poignant atmosphere. Anirudh's music enhances the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece in the film. The song captures the essence of longing and connection, resonating deeply with the audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful melody of Kannaane Kanne from the movie Naanum Rowdydhaan. This enchanting song, penned by Vignesh Shivan and brought to life by Anirudh's mesmerizing music, captures the essence of love and longing. Let the soothing vocals of Sean Roldan transport you to a world of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Dear child, don't be upset. Dear child, don't be upset.
Whoever leaves, it doesn't matter. Whoever leaves, it doesn't matter. I will be here, so don't be upset.
For a moment, don't be with Priya.
My life, my life, you shouldn't cry.
The worries you see shouldn't be erased.
As long as I'm here, you shouldn't cry.
Losing what you found and finding what you lost, getting used to it is normal.
Taking what is given, giving something else, forgetting what happened is a habit.
Dear child, don't be upset. You are the foundation of my life.
Dear child, don't be upset. Whoever leaves, it doesn't matter. I will be here.
My fingers should hold your fingers tightly, so much that they press together.
When I open my eyes, I should see your face. As long as I live, you should like me.
Like the waves of the sea, touching the shore, I am not the one who goes into the sea.
Like the sand of the sea, sticking to your feet, I will be the one who comes to the shore.
Dear child, don't be upset. You are the foundation of my life.
Dear child, don't be upset. Whoever leaves, it doesn't matter. I will be here.
For a moment, don't be with Priya.
My life, my life, you shouldn't cry.
The worries you see shouldn't be erased.
As long as I'm here, you shouldn't cry.
Every day, if you break, I am here to fix it.
Stay close and watch the path, life is living.
Even if parents leave, without a sound in your world, life is living to give a kiss every day.
